title: FDA Variance Applications Knowledge Graph
description: Procedural knowledge graph for FDA variance application processes

nodes.label: Variance Application Process
nodes.description: Main process for requesting FDA approval for alternative compliance methods

nodes.label: Form FDA 3147
nodes.description: Variance Application Form - Required for all variance requests

nodes.label: Form FDA 3640
nodes.description: Laser Light Show Report - Detailed show safety information

nodes.label: Form FDA 3632
nodes.description: Laser Product Report - Product specifications and testing data

nodes.label: Form FDA 3636
nodes.description: Annual Report Form - Required by September 1st yearly

nodes.label: Light Show Producer
nodes.description: Entity that assembles laser light shows, considered a manufacturer

nodes.label: Laser Projector Manufacturer
nodes.description: Entity that manufactures laser projection equipment

nodes.label: LIP/LILI Manufacturer
nodes.description: Entity that manufactures laser-illuminated projectors or lighting instruments

nodes.label: Dealer/Distributor
nodes.description: Entity that sells or distributes laser products

nodes.label: LIP/LILI User
nodes.description: Entity that uses LIP/LILI equipment in permanent or temporary installations

nodes.label: CDRH
nodes.description: Center for Devices and Radiological Health - FDA division processing variance applications

nodes.label: Dockets Management Staff
nodes.description: FDA DMS - issues Docket numbers for variance applications

nodes.label: Original Application
nodes.description: First-time variance approval request

nodes.label: Variance Renewal
nodes.description: Extension of existing variance approval

nodes.label: Variance Amendment
nodes.description: Changes to approved variance

nodes.label: Annual Reporting
nodes.description: Yearly submission to maintain variance status

nodes.label: September 1st Deadline
nodes.description: Annual report submission deadline

nodes.label: Accession Number
nodes.description: Tracking number issued by CDRH/DCC

nodes.label: Docket Number
nodes.description: Tracking number issued by DMS

nodes.label: Laser Notice #22
nodes.description: Defines manufacturer status for laser light show producers

nodes.label: Laser Notice #51
nodes.description: Clarifies laser light show procedures

nodes.label: Laser Notice #55
nodes.description: Clarifies automatic renewal policy

nodes.label: 21 CFR 1040.10(b)(13)
nodes.description: Regulation requiring variance for demonstration laser products

nodes.label: Email Submission
nodes.description: Send documents to RadHealthCustomerService@fda.hhs.gov

nodes.label: Complete Checklist
nodes.description: Verify all required items before submission

process_flows.name: Original Variance Application
steps: Identify product type and entity classification
Include manufacturer email on all forms
Include at least one make and model
Email as separate PDFs to CDRH
Include firm name in subject line

process_flows.name: Renewal After Expiration
steps: Complete cover sheet indicating expired status
